title: Wano Splits Between Udon and the Flower Capital
description: On pages 1–4, this part focuses on Wano Citizens, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Kyoshiro, Unknown person #4 as The Wano rebellion spreads between Udon prison, the Flower Capital, and the first shocks around Komurasaki and Orochi.
scene: The rebellion’s pieces scatter across Wano while Luffy struggles in Udon and Orochi’s court grows unstable in the Flower Capital.

dialogue.speaker: Wano Citizens
dialogue.text: Wano Country- The Flower Capital

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: SPECIALITY SOBA...!!

dialogue.speaker: Wano Citizens
dialogue.text: The current talk of the Capital is...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's SANGORO'S SPECIALITY SOBA!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Any news on Luffy?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: He's on a different island, so...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm sure he'll be out in time for the battle!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: MMMM... Deeeeeeee- Licious!!® It's stupidly delicious!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I thought I'd never get to eat Sanji's cooking again!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't care what you guys think, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: 0-ROB1 (HAAA)A AAAAN!!:)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Does you think it tastes good?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: It tastes amazing.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No. O-Robi-chan as a Geisha is what's really amazing!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sangoro, it tastes good, but isn't it a little too popular with the ladies!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You should spice it up a little so it tastes good with alcohol. That way, all the samural will line up!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why are you looking at me like that?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Are you even trying to gather Allies for us, you bastard!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hold that thought, franchise! I see some male customers heading this way.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Excuse me!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Remember because of

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Our apologies, ladies..!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "SCUSE ME, MISTER! Please don't cut in line!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Shut your trap!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: K'iaaaaa AAAAH!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey bro, you've got a nice shop here.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Yes, thank you!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you would like to have some, please go to the back of the line.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: No, you've misunder- stood...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We want to know who gave you permission to come to this island!!

dialogue.speaker: Kyoshiro
dialogue.text: We're part of the kyoshiro family.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: This is our island!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You'll have to pay us before you can operate a shop here!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's so that if something bad were to happen, we'd be able to protect your shop for ya.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Why?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's not necessary. I'm strong enough by myself.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...a few days ago, I was sent to the sitting room of a man named Kyoshiro.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: They must be his subor- diabetes.

dialogue.speaker: Orochi
dialogue.text: Lord Orochi is such a coward!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: He was quite an arrogant samural.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I heard that he's the leader of a Yakuza group.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Fine, then why don't you try protecting your shop from us!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: K'IAA AAH!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey, don't eat the soba at this shop!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: My soBAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Everyone, leave! Right now!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: The shop's closed for the day!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: This is bad, get back!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They did the one thing that will anger Sanji the most!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Hmmm? Is there gonna be a fight!?

summary: This section advances the Wano - Udon and Flower Capital storyline with 51 dialogue beats. Luffy’s prison struggle, Big Mom’s amnesia, and the Flower Capital drama show Wano’s rebellion becoming harder to control.
